records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like they're almost finished over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We believed it would be more satisfying if you took care of him yourself, so we sent him there with a compelling reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wir dachten, dass es befriedigender f9588r dich w95tre, wenn du dich selbst um ihn k9588mmern w9588rdest, also haben wir ihn aus einem triftigen Grund zu dir geschickt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Overall, the world getting invaded is advantageous, but the Demon Lord is also rewarded appropriately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, I have noticed that you occasionally lack understanding in the most unexpected places.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. From start to finish, all of it.

9u n95py ho95pn to95pn v95z l9589 do c95q nh95rn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, as with all studies, one practice session is worth a thousand lectures.
